[[Queen/Legends|Queen]] '''Marilla''' of [[Gascon]] was the [[Marriage/Legends|wife]] of the [[King/Legends|King]] of Gascon during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. A woman with pro-[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] leanings, her weak-willed [[Unidentified King of Gascon|husband]] was easily swayed by her counsel and by that of the corrupt and pro-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Holy Advisor]]. Marilla was also involved in an affair with the [[Prime Minister (Demigue)|Prime Minister]] of the distant [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Demigue]], to whom she gave a unique and valuable [[Ring/Legends|ring]] that had originally been given to her by the King.

The [[Unidentified Holy Advisor|Holy Advisor]] was aware of her infidelity, and hoped to ruin her with this information and put her in the king's disfavor. The queen, knowing the Holy Advisor planned to make his move the following week at a ball held by her husband, enlisted several agents (some reports indicate that they may have been diplomats seeking Gascon's formal alliance with the New Republic) to travel the hazardous "[[Demigue Terror]]" [[Hyperspace route/Legends|trade route]] to Demigue and recover the ring before the ball, avoiding cutthroats and [[Spy/Legends|spies]] sent by the Holy Advisor.
